title: Open Source Contribution Bounty Platform? : r/opensource
description: December 30, 2023 -When doing my demo the other day, seeing their faces just after mentioning the fact that it was an open-source project, here is what actually crossed my mind really fast: "f*** they didn't even notice it's open-source, they don't care, and even worse, they don't trust open-source to be a durable solution, what the hell, I should have shut the f*** up and pretend I'm a fortune 500 company". We are open-source nerds indeed. :) I forgot about algora, but here is the average bounty: 120$ I would be curious waht is the average amount of time needed to solve each issue.
